patterns.comment: assert/guarantee(...) failed: message — guarantee support, 3-level nesting, hex in message
bare assert/guarantee keyword not followed by known pattern
patterns.name: keyword.other.assert.hserr

patterns.comment: fatal error: message — with hex/address highlighting in message
Native function+offset in problematic frame: Symbol+0xoff
JRE/JVM version label and value with Java version extraction
Java version fallback for lines without parentheses
VM frame with qualified C++ symbol: Class::method(...)+0xoff
patterns.name: meta.frame.vm.hserr

patterns.comment: Native C frame with qualified C++ symbol: Class::method+0xoff
patterns.name: meta.frame.native.hserr

patterns.comment: Stub frame: v  ~StubName addr (optional address, stub name may have spaces)
patterns.name: meta.frame.stub.hserr

patterns.comment: Compiled Java: J 313 c2 class.method(sig)ret module@ver (N bytes) @ addr [addr+off]
patterns.name: meta.frame.compiled-java.hserr

patterns.comment: Java frame without explicit J/j prefix
patterns.name: meta.frame.java.hserr

memory_dump_line.comment: Generic memory dump line: address: words with optional ASCII trailer

patterns.comment: Register assignment: REG=0xVALUE across all architectures
Top-of-stack dump line: address, words, optional ASCII trailer
Hex address at start of each dump line
patterns.name: constant.numeric.hex.address.hserr

patterns.comment: Hex bytes in the dump — styled as plain text (no number highlight)
patterns.name: comment.block.hexdump.hserr

patterns.comment: Hex words in the dump — 4/8/16 nybble groups with optional pipes
patterns.name: comment.block.hexdump.hserr

patterns.comment: Bracket section markers: [Entry Point], [Verified Entry Point], [MachCode], [Stub Code], [Exception Handler], etc.
patterns.match: ^(\[(?:Entry Point|Verified Entry Point|MachCode|Stub Code|Exception Handler|Deopt Handler Code|Deopt Handler Entry Point|Instructions begin|Constants|Constant Pool(?:\s+\(empty\))?|Runtime Stub|Exception Handler Stub)\])

patterns.comment: Hex address at start of dump line or standalone
patterns.name: constant.numeric.hex.address.hserr

patterns.comment: Hex dump words after address with optional ASCII trailer
Code layout lines: total/relocation/main code/stub code/oops/metadata/scopes data/etc.
patterns.match: ^\s+(total in heap|relocation|main code|stub code|oops|metadata|scopes data|scopes pcs|dependencies|handler table|nul chk table|Compiled method)\s+(\[.*\])\s*=\s*(\d+)

patterns.comment: Assembly dump line: address: hex dump | hex dump ... with optional metadata/comments
Hex addresses and values that should NOT be colored as numbers
patterns.name: constant.numeric.hex.address.hserr

patterns.comment: Compilation event: nmethod install with optional % marker and code range
Compilation event: compile task with optional %, b/s markers, and optional @ bci
Internal exception event line (without detail message)
GC phase and control/concurrent event lines
Linux /proc/self/maps: addr_range perms offset dev inode [path]

metaspace.end: (?=^(?!Metaspace|\s|Usage:|Virtual space:|Chunk freelists:|MaxMetaspaceSize:|CompressedClassSpaceSize:|Initial GC|Current GC|CDS:|Narrow klass|Encoding Range:|Klass Range:|Klass ID Range:|Protection zone:|UseCompressedClassPointers|Internal statistics:)(?:\S))
